task_completion.description: Access the Floreant POS Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or main window is visible on the screen, indicating successful login with the Admin PIN.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Menu Items configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, tab, or dialog displaying the list of Menu Items is open within the Back Office.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target menu item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'Garlic Naan' is highlighted in the menu items list, or its specific edit dialog/window is open.

task_completion.description: Change the category of the target item to the new category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the edit dialog for 'Garlic Naan', the Category dropdown or field is actively set to 'SIDES'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the updated category in the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Menu Items list shows 'Garlic Naan' with 'SIDES' in its corresponding Category column, or the edit window is closed after clicking 'Save'/'OK' with the correct category selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS application windows, buttons, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to solve the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or database client interactions altering the menu items.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Floreant POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is clearly Floreant POS, not a text editor, image editor, or web browser displaying a mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target menu item is 'Garlic Naan'. It initially resides in the 'ENTREE' category and must be reassigned to the 'SIDES' category. The Administrator PIN required to access the Back Office is 1111.
